steps.title: Calculate the slope from two points
steps.content:
Using points $(1, 54)$ and $(2, 51)$ from the table:
$$m = \frac{51 - 54}{2 - 1} = \frac{-3}{1} = -3$$

steps.title: Find the y-intercept using the linear equation
steps.content:
Substitute the point $(1, 54)$ and slope $m = -3$ into $g(x) = mx + b$:
$$54 = -3(1) + b$$
$$54 = -3 + b$$
$$b = 57$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
